infoPlist.NSLocationWhenInUseUsageDescription: ASEEL needs your location to track camels and show nearby community alerts.
infoPlist.NSCameraUsageDescription: ASEEL uses the camera for camel photos and QR code scanning.
infoPlist.NSMicrophoneUsageDescription: ASEEL uses the microphone for Arabic voice notes.
infoPlist.NSPhotoLibraryUsageDescription: ASEEL accesses photos to upload camel images.

plugins.locationAlwaysAndWhenInUsePermission: Allow ASEEL to use your location.
